quotes.text: You're not angry, George. You're just bored, and you've confused the two your whole life.
quotes.speaker: Who's Afraid of Virginia Woolf? (1966)
quotes.context: Martha turning one of George's accusations back on him during a late-night argument
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — Martha's psychological knife-work on George is the engine of the whole film, and this kind of reframing jab is exactly her style. The giveaway is that it's slightly too clean and diagnostic; Martha's real lines are messier and more personally wounded.

quotes.text: A man who won't tell you what he's after has already decided you're in the way.
quotes.speaker: Unforgiven (1992)
quotes.context: William Munny warning the Schofield Kid before they ride out
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — the film's dialogue has this exact flavor of hard-earned, low-key fatalism, and Munny does occasionally speak in blunt moral observations. The giveaway is the almost epigrammatic structure; Munny's real lines are shorter and rougher, less composed.

quotes.speaker: Gladiator (2000)
quotes.context: Maximus (Russell Crowe) shouts at the Zucchabar arena crowd after killing his opponents in a brutal fight.

quotes.speaker: The Lion King (1994)
quotes.context: Timon and Pumbaa teach Simba their carefree "no worries" philosophy, both as spoken dialogue and as the title song.

quotes.speaker: The Terminator (1984)
quotes.context: The Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) tells the police desk sergeant he'll be back, then drives a car through the front of the station.

quotes.text: Honey, the only thing between us and a good time is your common sense.
quotes.speaker: Some Like It Hot (1959)
quotes.context: Jerry (as Daphne) flirting outrageously with Sugar
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — the film's breezy, double-edged innuendo is all over the script, and this line fits Jerry's reckless, feminine-costumed flirtation perfectly. The giveaway is that it's a touch too suave; Jerry's actual humor comes from flustered desperation rather than smooth delivery.
